      • targetMember(ctx: UserContext): Option[Member]
        update
      • update(ctx: ComponentContext | ModalContext; content = ""; embeds: seq[Embed] = @[]; components: seq[MessageComponent] = @[]; attachments: seq[Attachment] = @[]; allowedMentions = none AllowedMentions): owned(Future[void])
        user
      • user(ctx: InteractionContext): User
        values
      • values(ctx: ComponentContext): seq[string]

Context objects' behavior: typed accessors on the interaction and response helpers that track state so you can't double-respond.

Response flow

  • reply sends the initial response; called again (or after followup) it automatically becomes a followup, and after deferReply it edits the deferred placeholder.
  • update/deferUpdate (components and modals) edit the message the component sits on instead of sending a new one.
  • suggest is the only response an autocomplete handler can send.

All REST traffic goes through handler.rest, so everything here is testable against a recording backend.

Imports

types, extract

Procs

proc appPermissions(ctx: InteractionContext): set[PermissionFlags] {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc channelId(ctx: InteractionContext): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc checkCooldown(ctx: InteractionContext; path: string; seconds: float;
                   bucket: CooldownBucket) {....raises: [UserError],
    tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Enforces one use per seconds per bucket, raising UserError with the remaining time when the command is still cooling down. The slash/user/message macros inject this for cooldown = … settings; call it yourself for programmatic handlers. 
proc customId(ctx: ComponentContext | ModalContext): string
proc defaultOnError(ctx: InteractionContext; e: ref Exception): owned(
    Future[void]) {....stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, IOError],
                    tags: [RootEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Installed by newInteractionHandler: logs to stderr and, if nothing was sent yet, replies with a generic ephemeral error message. UserError is special-cased: its message goes to the user as an ephemeral reply (or followup) and nothing is logged. Set handler.onError = nil to let exceptions propagate instead. 
proc deferReply(ctx: InteractionContext; ephemeral = false): owned(
    Future[void]) {....stackTrace: false,
                    raises: [Exception, DimslashError, ValueError],
                    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Acknowledges the interaction with a loading placeholder; follow with reply (which edits the placeholder) or followup. 
proc deferUpdate(ctx: ComponentContext | ModalContext): owned(Future[void]) {.
    ...stackTrace: false.}
Acknowledges a component interaction without any visible change; follow with update or edit. 
proc delete(ctx: InteractionContext; messageId = "@original"): Future[void] {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Deletes the original response (or a followup by id). 
proc edit(ctx: InteractionContext; content = ""; embeds: seq[Embed] = @[];
          components: seq[MessageComponent] = @[];
          attachments: seq[Attachment] = @[]; files: seq[DiscordFile] = @[];
          allowedMentions = none AllowedMentions; messageId = "@original"): Future[
    Message] {....stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, ValueError],
               tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Edits the original response (or a followup by id). The message becomes exactly what you pass: omitted content/embeds/components are cleared. 
proc field(ctx: ModalContext; customId: string): Option[string] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
One text-input value of the submitted modal. 
proc fieldAsFloat(ctx: ModalContext; customId, label: string): float {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, UserError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
field parsed as a number; raises UserError when it doesn't parse. 
proc fieldAsInt(ctx: ModalContext; customId, label: string): int {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, UserError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
field parsed as an integer. Discord can't validate text inputs, so a non-number raises UserError — a polite ephemeral message via the default error hook. The modalForm macro generates these calls for int fields. 
proc fields(ctx: ModalContext): Table[string, string] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
All text-input values of the submitted modal, keyed by custom_id. 
proc focusedValue(ctx: AutocompleteContext): string {....raises: [KeyError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
The partial text the user has typed so far, as a string. 
proc followup(ctx: InteractionContext; content = ""; embeds: seq[Embed] = @[];
              components: seq[MessageComponent] = @[];
              attachments: seq[Attachment] = @[];
              files: seq[DiscordFile] = @[];
              allowedMentions = none AllowedMentions; ephemeral = false;
              tts = false): Future[Message] {....stackTrace: false,
    raises: [Exception, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Sends a followup message (requires an initial response or deferral). 
proc guildId(ctx: InteractionContext): Option[string] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc inGuild(ctx: InteractionContext): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc locale(ctx: InteractionContext): Option[string] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc member(ctx: InteractionContext): Option[Member] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc message(ctx: ComponentContext): Option[Message] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
The message the clicked component is attached to. 
proc newTextInput(customId, label: string; style = tisShort; required = true;
                  placeholder = ""; value = ""; minLen = 0; maxLen = 0): MessageComponent {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
A modal text input, already wrapped in the action row Discord requires (dimscord has builders for buttons/selects but not these). Pass the results straight to showModal. 
proc optField(ctx: ModalContext; customId: string): Option[string] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Like field, but an empty (untouched optional) input becomes none. 
proc optFieldAsFloat(ctx: ModalContext; customId, label: string): Option[float] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, UserError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc optFieldAsInt(ctx: ModalContext; customId, label: string): Option[int] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, UserError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc original(ctx: InteractionContext): Future[Message] {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Fetches the original interaction response. 
proc reply(ctx: InteractionContext; content = ""; embeds: seq[Embed] = @[];
           components: seq[MessageComponent] = @[];
           attachments: seq[Attachment] = @[]; files: seq[DiscordFile] = @[];
           allowedMentions = none AllowedMentions; ephemeral = false;
           tts = false): owned(Future[void]) {....stackTrace: false,
    raises: [Exception, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}

Replies to the interaction. State-aware: the first call sends the initial response, after deferReply it fills in the placeholder, and any later call becomes a followup.

files are only supported after a deferral or initial response (Discord limitation of the initial-response callback in dimscord).

proc selectedChannels(ctx: ComponentContext): seq[ResolvedChannel] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc selectedMembers(ctx: ComponentContext): seq[Member] {....raises: [KeyError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc selectedRoles(ctx: ComponentContext): seq[Role] {....raises: [KeyError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc selectedUsers(ctx: ComponentContext): seq[User] {....raises: [KeyError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc showModal(ctx: InteractionContext; customId, title: string;
               components: seq[MessageComponent]): owned(Future[void]) {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, DimslashError, ValueError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Opens a modal as the initial response. Not allowed for modal-submit or autocomplete interactions (Discord rejects those). 
proc showModal(ctx: InteractionContext; form: ModalForm;
               captures: varargs[string, `$`]): Future[void] {.
    ...raises: [DimslashError, Exception, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Opens a modal declared with the modalForm macro. captures fill the form pattern's {...} captures in declaration order (they may be any $-able values); a count or type mismatch raises DimslashError. 
proc suggest(ctx: AutocompleteContext; choices: openArray[(string, float)]): Future[
    void] {....raises: [Exception, DimslashError, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect],
            forbids: [].}
(label, value) number suggestions (raw JSON: dimscord's choice type cannot represent float values). 
proc suggest(ctx: AutocompleteContext; choices: openArray[(string, int)]): Future[
    void] {....raises: [Exception, DimslashError, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect],
            forbids: [].}
(label, value) integer suggestions. 
proc suggest(ctx: AutocompleteContext; choices: openArray[(string, string)]): Future[
    void] {....raises: [Exception, DimslashError, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect],
            forbids: [].}
(label, value) string suggestions. 
proc suggest(ctx: AutocompleteContext;
             choices: seq[ApplicationCommandOptionChoice]): Future[void] {.
    ...raises: [Exception, DimslashError, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Sends autocomplete suggestions. Only the first 25 are sent (Discord's hard limit). 
proc suggest(ctx: AutocompleteContext; choices: seq[string]): Future[void] {.
    ...raises: [Exception, DimslashError, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
String suggestions where the label is also the value. 
proc target(ctx: MessageContext): Message {....raises: [KeyError, DimslashError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc target(ctx: UserContext): User {....raises: [KeyError, DimslashError],
                                      tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc targetMember(ctx: UserContext): Option[Member] {....raises: [KeyError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Guild member data for the target user, when invoked in a guild. 
proc update(ctx: ComponentContext | ModalContext; content = "";
            embeds: seq[Embed] = @[]; components: seq[MessageComponent] = @[];
            attachments: seq[Attachment] = @[];
            allowedMentions = none AllowedMentions): owned(Future[void]) {.
    ...stackTrace: false.}
Edits the message the component/modal came from instead of sending a new one. After deferUpdate this edits the original message via REST. 
proc user(ctx: InteractionContext): User {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
The invoking user (in guilds, taken from the member object). 
proc values(ctx: ComponentContext): seq[string] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Raw values picked in a select menu (empty for buttons).

Made with Nim. Generated: 2026-07-11 04:53:07 UTC
